items.title: Why are gasoline prices rising faster than oil prices? Blame it on the ‘crack.’
items.description: The spread between the cost of barrels of gasoline and crude oil — known as the “crack spread” — has widened sharply.

items.title: Lumentum’s stock just got a lot more interesting — and Barclays has turned bullish

items.title: Wall Street’s AI divide: Inside the bull and bear cases for what comes next for the stock market
items.description: Three years into the AI trade, Wall Street is no closer to agreeing about whether it’s a bubble, how much longer it can keep going or what might ultimately end it.
